chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-455 of 2024 Date of Hearing ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.10.2025. 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on maintainability of Main Case. Mr. Atta Hussain Qadri, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A.G., along with Syed Riaz Hussain Shah, DEO, Primary, Jacobabad and ASI Mumtaz Ahmed Gorshani on behalf of SSP, Jacobabad. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P.G. ------------------------ Petitioner Muhammad Khan Chachar has filed instant petition with the following prayer:- a. To direct the respondent NO.2 to restore/unblock the account No.1904-7 of NBP Branch Garhi Khairo in accordance with law. b. To grant any other adequate and equitable relief in view of the above-stated facts and circumstances of the case. Learned Counsel for the petitioner, inter alia, submits that the petitioner has been acquitted in all the cases registered against him; whereas, only in one case based on Crime No.02/2021, u/s 302, 323, 337-H, 148, 149, PPC, which is pending trial, he is on bail. Learned Counsel further submits that A/c No.1904-7 of the petitioner being maintained by him with National Bank of Pakistan Branch Garhi Khairo was blocked by the concerned bank authorities with reference to judgment dated 02.10.2023 passed by a Divisional Bench of this Court at Karachi in Special Criminal A.T.A No.133 of 2020, though the petitioner is not shown absconder and/or proclaimed offender in any criminal cases. Pursuant to the Court notices, the respondent No.2/ Branch Manager, NBP Garhi Khairo Branch had filed his statement dated 20.12.2024, stating therein that CNIC of the petitioner was blocked by the Home Department, Govt. of Sindh in compliance of order dated 02.10.2023 passed by High Court of Sindh at Karachi in Spl.

Learned Counsel further submits that A/c No.1904-7 of the petitioner being maintained by him with National Bank of Pakistan Branch Garhi Khairo was blocked by the concerned bank authorities with reference to judgment dated 02.10.2023 passed by a Divisional Bench of this Court at Karachi in Special Criminal A.T.A No.133 of 2020, though the petitioner is not shown absconder and/or proclaimed offender in any criminal cases. Pursuant to the Court notices, the respondent No.2/ Branch Manager, NBP Garhi Khairo Branch had filed his statement dated 20.12.2024, stating therein that CNIC of the petitioner was blocked by the Home Department, Govt. of Sindh in compliance of order dated 02.10.2023 passed by High Court of Sindh at Karachi in Spl. Cr. ATA No.133/2020. Comments have also been filed today by SSP, Jacobabad as well as District Education Officer (Primary), Jacobabad. Per comments of SSP, Jacobabad, the petitioner was involved in four cases viz., Crime Nos.14/2020, No.24/2021, 05/2022 and 02/2023, all registered at P.S Punhoon Bhatti and he was acquitted in all those cases; whereas, one case based on Crime No.02/2021 of PS Tajodero is pending trial, wherein he is on bail. No other case is shown registered against the petitioner. The respondent NO.6/DEO, Primary, Jacobabad, in his comments has stated that the petitioner has been receiving his monthly salary through official payroll system vide his account being maintained with Askari Bank Ltd. Market Chowk Branch Hyderabad, IBAN # PK33ASCM0001170320220508. The learned Addl. A.G., as well as learned Addl. P.G. have recorded no objection if the petition is allowed. In view of the fact that the petitioner is not shown as absconder/proclaimed offender in any criminal case, instant petition is allowed. Resultantly, the respondents are directed to unblock account No.1904-7 of NBP Branch Garhi Khairo of the petitioner. Office is directed to send copy of the order to respondents for compliance. JUDGE JUDGE
